(https://www.fontstruct.com/fontstructions/show/1789346) by “JustAngelSQ” is
licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution Share Alike license
(http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/3.0/).
“Apple Kid (Cyrillic included)” was originally cloned (copied) from the
FontStruction “Earthbound Menu Extended”
(https://www.fontstruct.com/fontstructions/show/1493390) by “M.E.R.255”,
which is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution Share Alike license
(http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/3.0/).
